policyMetadata.noncomplianceMessage: DRCP control 'drcp-aps-08 - Audit for injection of App Service apps into a virtual network'. For remediation, see https://confluence.office01.internalcorp.net:8453/display/DRCPKB/Incident+remediation+App+Service#IncidentremediationAppService#drcp-aps-08 .

policyDefinition.displayName: APG DRCP App Service Site should have virtual network injection
policyDefinition.description: This policy enforces injecting App Service apps (not hosted in an App Service Environment) in a virtual network, unlocking advanced App Service networking and security features and providing greater control over network security configurations. Learn more at: https://docs.microsoft.com/azure/app-service/web-sites-integrate-with-vnet.

drcp.name: AppServiceSiteVirtualNetworkInjection
drcp.controlDesc: Audit for injection of App Service apps into a virtual network

metadata.description: Effect of this Azure Policy - Audit, Deny or Disabled.
